sections.paragraph:
Original: דּלת

Transliteration: deleth

Phonetic: deh'-leth

BDB Definition:

  1. door, gate
    1. a door
    2. a gate
    3. (figuratively)
      1. of chest lid
      2. of crocodile jaws
      3. of doors of the heavens
      4. of an easily-accessible woman

Origin: from H1802

TWOT entry: 431a, e

Part(s) of speech: Noun Feminine
